summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FuelPoint Navigator Service Centers feature. Backend API returns 118 service centers correctly across 40 US states and Canadian provinces (AB, BC, ON, QC). All filtering functions (state, fuel_type, service_type) work correctly. Frontend Services tab displays all 118 centers, filter modal opens and functions properly, and individual service center details page shows complete information including map, contact info, fuel specializations, services offered, and certifications.

integration_issues.issue: Canadian provinces (AB, BC, ON, QC) are not included in the state dropdown options. The US_STATES array in ServicesFilterModal.tsx only contains US states. Users cannot filter by Canadian provinces through the UI even though the backend supports it.

action_items: Update US_STATES array in ServicesFilterModal.tsx to include Canadian provinces: AB, BC, ON, QC (rename to STATES_AND_PROVINCES for clarity)
critical_code_review_comments: The ServicesFilterModal.tsx has US_STATES array that doesn't include Canadian provinces. Since the app supports Canadian service centers, the dropdown should include AB, BC, ON, QC.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully functional with 118 service centers across 40 states/provinces. Frontend works correctly but filter modal needs Canadian provinces added to the dropdown. All 24 pytest tests pass. Service center details page displays complete information including map, contact info, certifications, and services offered.

categories_tested: Canadian provinces filtering (AB, BC, ON, QC)
Fuel type filtering (Hydrogen, CNG, Electric, LNG)

frontend_tests.filter_modal: PASS - opens and functions (needs Canadian provinces)
